$comment: Curated static selection for launch-board-01. planning-board-01 supplies the board baseline; the implementation adds release-themed local seed cards, search, column filtering, and a local add-item action.

assumptions: planning-board-01 is the stocked planning-board screen pattern and its column-transition model fits the application.
board-column-01 provides the drag-and-drop and move controls that change a card's workflow status.
All cards and counts derive from one local seed set plus session-local moves and additions.
risks: No project-tracking service, workflow permissions, or persistence is connected.
Cross-column keyboard reordering is delegated to the board and is not a full keyboard drag alternative.
